title: Malted Dutch Bake
description: A sweet and crunchy Dutch bake made with crumbled malted cookies and topped with a crispy brie crust.
instructions: In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together malted cookies, Dutch baking powder, and granulated sugar.
Add melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract to the bowl. Mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Top with crumbled brie cheese and crispy rice cereal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the edges are set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
